body.body:
W1: Route ALL SQLite access through DatabaseProxy — no raw sqlite3.connect anywhere.

Files to change:
1. wild_igor/igor/tools/notebook.py — replace sqlite3.connect() calls with DatabaseProxy(path)() context manager. Keep same schema/SQL, just wrap the connection.
2. wild_igor/igor/tools/budget.py — same: replace sqlite3.connect with DatabaseProxy.
3. wild_igor/igor/cognition/word_graph.py — has persistent conn (check_same_thread=False) at line 293; replace with DatabaseProxy. word_graph is long-lived so hold a DatabaseProxy instance, call it per-operation.

W2: Add to wild_igor/igor/memory/db_proxy.py (MEDIUM inertia — read carefully first):
- ensure_index(table: str, columns: tuple, unique: bool = False) -> None: idempotent CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_{table}_{col1}_{col2}; records in _cc_index_registry table in that DB; thread-safe
- _explain_cache: dict[str, bool] — sha256(sql)[:12] -> uses_index; populated lazily
- _index_hits: dict[str, int] — index_name -> hit count
- _track_index_usage(sql): run EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN, check for USING INDEX in output, find index name, increment _index_hits[name]; only runs once per unique sql hash
- Call _track_index_usage in _DBContext._on_sql()
- get_index_report() -> dict: {index_name: {hits, table, columns, created_at}}
- _cc_index_registry table: (index_name TEXT PK, table_name TEXT, columns TEXT, created_at TEXT)

Forensic logging: log to db_queries.log when ensure_index creates a new index.
Syntax check all files after editing.
Do NOT change cortex.py — it already uses db_proxy correctly.
body.title: D092: db_proxy universal gateway + index lifecycle (W1+W2)
body.result: W1: notebook.py — _get_db→DatabaseProxy per user_slug (_PROXIES dict, schema init on first use), 4 functions converted to with _proxy(slug)() as con:; budget.py — _conn()→DatabaseProxy singleton (_BUDGET_PROXY), 5 with _db_proxy()() as c: replacements; word_graph.py — self._conn→self._db DatabaseProxy, _WordDocProxy takes DatabaseProxy, _inc_doc_count(conn) param, all methods use with self._db() as conn:, PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL set at init (persistent), explicit commits removed. W2: db_proxy.py — added hashlib/re/threading imports, _in_explain thread-local, _track_index_usage() (EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN once per sql hash, accumulate _index_hits), ensure_index() (idempotent CREATE INDEX + _cc_index_registry table + db_log), get_index_report(); _on_sql() calls _track_index_usage. All 4 files syntax OK.
